summary: Tested 3 new blog post integrations: /blog/dryer-not-heating, /blog/appliance-repair-cost-san-francisco, and regression check on /blog/refrigerator-not-cooling. All 8 required test cases passed: pages render, cards appear in blog listing, San Francisco category filter works, navigation works, and schema markup is correct.

issues: No visible HTML breadcrumb back-to-/blog in post content — only JSON-LD schema breadcrumbs. Navigation to /blog exists via navbar 'More → Blog & Tips' dropdown only. Minor UX improvement: add visible breadcrumb HTML in article hero (e.g. Home → Blog → Article) for user discoverability.

test_1_dryer_not_heating_title.description: Page renders with correct H1 title
test_1_dryer_not_heating_title.expected: Dryer Not Heating? Common Causes & Repair Cost in San Francisco
test_1_dryer_not_heating_title.actual: Dryer Not Heating? Common Causes & Repair Cost in San Francisco

test_2_appliance_repair_cost_sf_title.description: Page renders with correct H1 title
test_2_appliance_repair_cost_sf_title.expected: Appliance Repair Cost in San Francisco 2026
test_2_appliance_repair_cost_sf_title.actual: Appliance Repair Cost in San Francisco 2026 — Complete Price Guide

test_3_refrigerator_not_cooling_regressi.actual: Page loads with title 'Refrigerator Not Cooling? 7 Causes & Fixes [SF Technician Guide]', content contains refrigerator/cooling content

test_4_blog_listing_cards.description: Blog listing shows cards for both new posts with correct data-testid attributes

test_5_san_francisco_category_filter.description: San Francisco category filter tab visible
test_5_san_francisco_category_filter.actual: Filter tab found with text 'San Francisco'

test_7a_dryer_schema_markup.description: JSON-LD Article schema with correct headline
test_7a_dryer_schema_markup.actual: Article schema found, headline='Dryer Not Heating? Common Causes & Repair Cost in San Francisco'

test_7b_sf_cost_schema_markup.description: JSON-LD Article schema with correct headline
test_7b_sf_cost_schema_markup.actual: Article schema found, headline='Appliance Repair Cost in San Francisco 2026 — Complete Price Guide'

test_8_navigation.description: Navigation to home and back to blog works

checks.blog_link: PASS - '/blog' via More → Blog & Tips dropdown in SiteNavbar

action_items: OPTIONAL LOW: Add visible HTML breadcrumb (Home → Blog → Article) in DryerNotHeating.js and ApplianceRepairCostSanFrancisco.js hero sections for better UX. Currently only JSON-LD schema breadcrumbs exist; navigation to /blog relies on navbar More dropdown.
critical_code_review_comments: Both new blog components correctly implement SEO: Article + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schemas
data-testid='article-title' on H1 in both components - good testability
data-testid='faq-section' and data-testid='faq-toggle-{i}' on FAQ elements - good
STATIC_POSTS in BlogListPage.js correctly includes both new posts at indices 12-13
Routes in App.js lines 229-230 correctly wired to DryerNotHeating and ApplianceRepairCostSanFrancisco components
San Francisco category (from ApplianceRepairCostSF post) correctly appears as filter tab via dynamic category extraction in BlogListPage
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 blog posts (dryer-not-heating, appliance-repair-cost-san-francisco, refrigerator-not-cooling) are working correctly. The blog listing page shows all posts with correct data-testid attributes. San Francisco category filter tab is working. Schema markup is correct on both new posts. Navigation works via SiteNavbar (logo=home, More dropdown=Blog & Tips). No bugs found.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found. All integration tests pass.
